productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Grey Classic Turf Backpack
description: Style Note A backpack easily distributes the weight across your shoulders and back, making loads easy to carry while keeping you looking cool and confident. Fill this trendy nike backpacks with your sportswear when you're heading to the field or gym, or use it on a trek in the great outdoors, and enjoy the ample storing space for all your gear. Product Details A grey and black backpack with a fluorescent nike swoosh and graphic print in front Two padded shoulder straps with one short handle on top and padded back One main zippered compartment with open internal organiser pockets One easily accessible zippered pocket in front Material and Care 75% polyester and 25% nylon exterior, 100% nylon lining Do not machine wash or dry clean Do not bleach or iron Wipe with a damp cloth when necessary and line dry Size Height: 40 cm Width: 27 cm Depth: 14 cm
